PowerShell(Get-Content "C:\\Users\\azert\\.claude\\projects\\D--Prog-Quran-revision\\b72c0e3b-49cb-4acb-b085-dffb5ff394df.jsonl" | ConvertFrom-Json | Where-Object { $_.type -in @\("user","assistant"\) } | ForEach-Object { $role = $_.type; $content = if \($_.message.content -is [string]\) { $_.message.content } elseif \($_.message.content -is [array]\) { \($_.message.content | Where-Object { $_.type -eq "text" } | Select-Object -First 1\).text } else { "" }; if \($content -and $content.Length -gt 0\) { "$role`: $\($content.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(500, $content.Length\)\)\)" } })
